claim: The local inventory covers 584 raw series across 8 provider groups and 31 registered features.
evidence_grade: A for local inventory; B for release-risk classification.
limitation: Provider files remain local and untracked.

claim: Every registered or discovered processed feature receives one usage status; 25 are marked primary_analysis.
Selected-major crypto returns share a strong common factor on the matched current-cohort daily panel.
limitation: Current-cohort daily data is survivorship-biased and does not establish historical altseason behavior.

claim: Later-sample equity co-movement is higher in the synchronized BTC/ETH exposure tables.
limitation: Period splits are descriptive and do not identify ETF effects.

claim: Lagged leverage/funding/OI states are associated with volatility and tail-stress diagnostics.
limitation: Liquidation observations are timing-sensitive and do not prove directional liquidation attribution.

claim: ETF flow-return associations are reported as lag-response market-plumbing diagnostics with separate BTC and ETH source starts.
limitation: Reported ETF flows have timing and simultaneity concerns; no causal price-impact claim.

claim: Stablecoin supply and DeFi TVL are endogenous liquidity-state proxies; raw USD TVL embeds valuation content.
limitation: No exogenous liquidity-shock language is supported.

claim: Same-day MVRV is measurement mechanics; lagged holder-state tables are diagnostics, not primary same-day factors.
limitation: Realized-cap source conventions affect residual interpretation.

claim: Chain fundamentals and PIT state variables currently support coverage and state-model diagnostics before headline relationship claims.
limitation: PIT state is monthly and cannot support daily constituent-performance claims.

claim: Selected-major risk separates into a common crypto factor and asset-specific residual risk on the matched current-cohort window.
limitation: Short histories and current-cohort survivorship bias limit historical interpretation.

claim: Current-top50 daily returns are historical altseason evidence.
limitation: Current-cohort daily analysis is survivorship-biased; PIT monthly data supports structure/state analysis only.

claim: ETF flows cause same-day crypto returns.
limitation: Flow timing and simultaneity prevent causal interpretation.
